issues.title: Inverted password verification logic
issues.description: Login accepts passwords that do not match the stored hash.
issues.fix: Return True only when plain equals the stored hash.

issues.title: Admin route lacks authentication guard
issues.description: /admin/users is exposed without any auth check.
issues.fix: Require a bearer token and admin role before listing users.

issues.title: SQL built with f-string concatenation
issues.description: User input is interpolated into SQL, enabling injection.

issues.title: DEBUG enabled in configuration
issues.description: Debug mode leaks stack traces and enables the Werkzeug debugger.

issues.title: Hard-coded SECRET_KEY placeholder
issues.description: Session signing key is committed in source instead of env.
issues.fix: Load SECRET_KEY from environment with a safe dev fallback.

issues.title: Query references non-existent table `user`
issues.description: The schema uses `users` but the lookup queries `user`.

issues.title: Wildcard CORS enabled
issues.description: Any origin may call browser-authenticated endpoints.
issues.fix: Restrict CORS to an explicit allow-list.
